blurb: An events-focused site — live music, art openings, festivals, or whatever you put on the calendar.

story.title: Our story
paragraphs: We program a calendar we'd want to attend ourselves — a mix of touring acts, neighbors, regular favorites, and the occasional one-off. Every event is a chance to be in a room together at a scale that still feels human.
We pay every artist. We program for our community, not for an algorithm.

hero.alt: Front of a venue with a lit marquee at night

about.alt: Wide interior of the room set for an event

venue.parking: Street parking; lot one block north
venue.accessibility: Step-free entry, accessible restrooms, ASL on request
venue.rentalBlurb: Available for private events, screenings, weddings, and pop-ups.

testimonials.quote: The best small space in the region — every event feels intentional.
testimonials.author: M. Alvarez
